message:
Add edge-case robustness tests for ChatGPT and Cline connectors

Extend ChatGPT and Cline connector test suites with malformed input
coverage (br-2w98), matching the pattern established for other
connectors:

ChatGPT: truncated JSON, type mismatches in mapping nodes, deeply
nested JSON (200+ levels), large message bodies (1MB), null bytes,
nonexistent files, missing content parts/text, invalid UTF-8, mixed
valid/invalid conversation files.

Cline: truncated JSON, JSON object instead of array, type mismatches
in messages, deeply nested JSON, large message bodies, null bytes,
malformed metadata, mixed valid/invalid tasks, extra fields preserved.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
